title: Flea Treatment Long Island City, Queens | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Long Island City, Queens. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service!
intro: Long Island City residents deserve a flea-free home, and Best Pest Control NYC delivers comprehensive flea treatment services throughout this vibrant Queens neighborhood. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of flea infestations in Long Island City's mix of historic rowhouses, modern high-rises, and converted industrial lofts. We provide effective, pet-safe flea extermination with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size and severity of your infestation.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving Long Island City for years with proven flea elimination methods that work the first time. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for your family and pets, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee that ensures your home stays flea-free.
localContext: Long Island City's dense residential areas near Court Square, Hunters Point, and the waterfront make it particularly susceptible to flea problems, especially in buildings with shared walls and pet-friendly policies. Whether you live in one of the luxury towers along the East River or a charming walk-up near MoMA PS1, our local expertise ensures we can quickly access your property and eliminate fleas at every life stage.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Long Island City?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Long Island City typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, because flea eggs can continue to hatch for up to two weeks, we recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure complete elimination of all flea life stages.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children out of treated areas for 2-4 hours while products dry, after which the space is completely safe to occupy.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Long Island City apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll need to vacate your apartment for approximately 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment to allow products to settle and dry. Our technicians will give you a specific re-entry time. This brief inconvenience ensures maximum effectiveness and your family's safety.
